tier_rationale: Multiple guide documents are updated to resolve operational rule conflicts; no application code or production configuration is changed.
request_summary: Apply all recommended multi-agent harness documentation fixes and require verbatim inline reports in session logs.
goal: Make the harness guide internally consistent and strengthen session logs so every inline user-facing update is preserved verbatim.

positive: Resolve the reentry gate versus TASK_CREATED ordering conflict
Align Analyst tool permissions with required audit and logging duties
Separate task status, notification status, and severity enums
Require verbatim preservation of inline reports in session logs
negative: Do not include secrets or environment variable values
Do not remove append-only history requirements

success_criteria: Updated documents state the session reentry exception to TASK_CREATED-first ordering
Tool permissions allow limited Analyst audit shell usage while preserving safety boundaries
Generator and git branch policies agree on Tier 1 and non-git workspace exceptions
Output and notification schemas distinguish task_status, notification_status, and severity
Task Spec schema defines a persistent SSOT location
Work history and output format policies require verbatim inline report preservation
CURRENT_STATE.md authority table reflects updated document versions

context.relevant_history: TASK-20260426-032 identified the documentation gaps and priority improvements.

artifact_refs.description: Prior review findings used as the basis for this update
